## Checklist
- [ ] `npm test` is green (add/adjust a test for the change)
- [ ] If a cartridge, workflow, or Agent Graph format changed: `SPEC.md` + `schemas/` updated and consistent
- [ ] Example artifacts regenerated if needed (`scripts/smoke.mjs`, `platform/seed.mjs`)
- [ ] English + legally neutral (no trademarked franchise names)
- [ ] No dependency added to the core; no private keys committed
